# Session Intelligence Explainability

Explaining session intelligence ranking decisions to operators requires surfacing which signals drove the final score, not just the score itself. Session intelligence explainability is most useful when it annotates each injected artifact with its contributing factors inline rather than in a separate log. Without session intelligence explainability, tuning ranking weights becomes guesswork and erodes operator trust over time.
